h9cbee2b0g5e05g434fgbcf7gfd81eb6ad132: *Through music and vision, the sovereign reveals the truth of the fungal creature before you.*
hca7e9339gc815g45a2g9338g7ee81233a620: *You see a frothing duergar, axe drawn, crazed by bloodlust, bearing down on a young myconid.*
hcc8894dbgafefg4a1bgb642gf594837cdbbb: *The frightened myconid circle conjures mildewed vines. They encircle and transform the duergar.*
h145321c2g7ac2g49b4gbb70gee2b281bc3d2: *It now belongs to the circle. It will obey the sovereign.*
h300cd9f2g9073g4354gb163g8a7fe709f22e: Attack the circle. No duergar deserves this fate.
h8cafd00fg3da5g4afegb6dfg75dae3f3044c: *The silent servant awaits its sovereign's orders.*
